autoscaling.autoscalinggroup.memorymibre: `MemoryMiBRequest` is a property of the `InstanceRequirements` property of the [AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup LaunchTemplateOverrides](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-autoscaling-autoscalinggroup-launchtemplateoverrides.html) property type that describes the minimum and maximum instance memory size for an instance type, in MiB.
